transactions.desc: The Giants optioned Whisenhunt to Triple-A Sacramento on Thursday.
The Angels optioned Kerry to Triple-A Salt Lake on Thursday.
The Angels optioned Porter to Triple-A Salt Lake on Thursday.
Atlanta optioned Camargo to Triple-A Gwinnett on Thursday.
The Cardinals optioned Roycroft to Triple-A Memphis on Thursday.
The Toronto Blue Jays traded C Tyler Heineman to the Los Angeles Angels.
The Toronto Blue Jays traded C Alejandro Kirk to the Los Angeles Angels.
The Seattle Mariners traded RHP Randy Dobnak to the Kansas City Royals.
The Phillies optioned Painter to Triple-A Lehigh Valley following his start against the Marlins on Wednesday.
Atlanta designated Stratton for assignment Wednesday.
The Athletics reinstated Civale (shoulder) from the injured list ahead of his start Wednesday against the Pirates.
The Athletics optioned Morales to Triple-A Las Vegas on Wednesday.
The Rockies optioned Halvorsen to Triple-A Albuquerque on Wednesday.
The Rockies reinstated Herget (shoulder) from the 15-day injured list Wednesday.
The Astros outrighted Weiss to Triple-A Sugar Land after he cleared waivers Wednesday, Chandler Rome of The Athletic reports.
The Giants activated Gage (knee) from the 15-day injured list Wednesday, Alex Pavlovic of NBC Sports Bay Area reports.
The Giants optioned Sanmartin to Triple-A Sacramento on Wednesday, Alex Pavlovic of NBC Sports Bay Area reports.
The Guardians recalled Watson from Triple-A Columbus on Wednesday.
The Giants recalled Whisenhunt from Triple-A Sacramento on Wednesday, Alex Pavlovic of NBC Sports Bay Area reports.
Atlanta selected Camargo's contract from Triple-A Gwinnett on Wednesday, Chad Bishop of The Atlanta Journal-Constitution reports.
Atlanta selected Carrasco's contract from Triple-A Gwinnett on Wednesday, Chad Bishop of The Atlanta Journal-Constitution reports.
Atlanta optioned Molina to Triple-A Gwinnett on Wednesday, Chad Bishop of The Atlanta Journal-Constitution reports.
The Mariners optioned Washington High-A Everett on Wednesday.
The Blue Jays recalled Dallas from Triple-A Buffalo on Wednesday.
The Mariners recalled Joe from Triple-A Tacoma on Wednesday.
The Angels designated Mancini for assignment Wednesday.
The Angels activated Grissom (oblique) from the 10-day injured list Wednesday.
The Tigers reinstated Mize (adductor) from the 15-day injured list ahead of his scheduled start Wednesday against the Astros in Houston.
The Mariners selected Washington's contract from High-A Everett on Tuesday, Ryan Divish of The Seattle Times reports.
The Padres released Gonzales on Tuesday, Jeff Sanders of The San Diego Union-Tribune reports.
